# Freeze OSF source cutoff and manifest digests

## Background

This issue was generated from `conductor/backlog.yml`; the criteria below are the track-specific acceptance contract.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Source cutoff, protocol digest, analysis manifest and package digests are recorded.
- [ ] OSF CLI validation passes against the draft or registration.
